name: 石川的烟
shooting_angle: close-up side view, held statically between fingers
readable_text_policy: 不添加文字标签、logo、水印或说明字
reference_context_policy: 使用手掌或手指局部作为比例锚点，无清晰陌生人脸
reference_prompt: A standard unlit cigarette, white filter tip and brown tobacco body, cylindrical shape, approximately 8cm long, held statically between fingers in mid-air, no visible faces or full body, focus on prop scale against hand partial.。源记录硬约束：数量:1支；位置:石川悠一指间停顿半空；运动政策:静止
